name: Amurut Mathew Koshy
headline: Senior Product Manager
summary: Senior Product Manager with 7+ years of cross-functional experience spanning software engineering, business analytics, and product leadership. Currently driving client onboarding and M&A automation products at ADP for the US market. Dual post-graduate background in AI/ML (BITS Pilani M.Tech, 2025) and Business Strategy (IIM Nagpur MBA), with hands-on expertise in LLM integrations, RAG pipelines, and Agile product delivery. Proven track record of generating measurable revenue growth, driving adoption at scale, and translating complex technical capabilities into market-ready products.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager – II
achievements: Product Leadership: Serve as Product Lead for 'Launchpad' — the Client Onboarding & Implementation module of Workforce Now, managing a cross-functional squad and full product lifecycle.

M&A Automation: Building an internal product for automated data movement for clients undergoing Mergers & Acquisitions, covering Payroll, Time & Tax domains; projected to reduce manual migration effort by over 50%.
System Integration: Sole PM for a Resource & Backlog Management module interfacing with CRM and billing systems, streamlining capacity planning across delivery teams.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
achievements: Revenue Growth: Created a new sales channel for Open Enrollment support, generating $2M in new recurring annual revenue.
Product Adoption: Led the Employee Communications channel of the Benefits Module; implemented enhancements that drove ADP Mobile adoption up by 80%+ YoY, adding 500K+ active sessions monthly.
AI & Automation: Spearheaded a Digitization Initiative leveraging AI-based OCR & data extraction algorithms, reducing inbound support call volumes by 15%.

Strategic AI Partnership: Integrated an AI-enabled Benefits Decision Support Platform for the US market in collaboration with an external AI vendor, expanding product value proposition for 20K+ clients.

experience.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Full-Stack Development: Built two Self-Service Automation frameworks and data analysis tools adopted by 8 teams, saving 20+ hours/week in manual effort.
Cloud Transformation: Core team member for migrating clients from legacy on-premise platforms to cloud-enabled architecture.
Data Engineering: Automated data pipelines, configuration loading, and validation processes, reducing pipeline errors by 30%.
Quality Assurance: Defined Benefit Squad: delivered QA coverage through Process, Batch, and Test Automation frameworks.

education.institution: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani
highlights: Dissertation: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with GPT-4 & Llama3 for Healthcare Taxation

education.degree: MBA – Decision Sciences & Information Systems | Strategy
highlights: Positions of Responsibility: Co-ordinator E-Cell · Executive Member Indo-Japan Research Centre · Student Affairs Council Representative · Executive Member Events Committee
Presented a research paper on Fall Detection Sensor at ICIoTCT 2017 (MNIT Jaipur) — Grant awarded by IISc Bangalore & KSCST
1st Place, Hackatronics (IEEE-RIT): Autonomous Heat Sensing Robot 'Heat Sink'
